programme.title: Angry Planet | B.C. Caving
programme.desc: In the porous limestone of Canada’s West Coast, great forces are at work under the ground, building and eroding the underground into fantastic shapes. In this episode we’ll witness George’s explorations of these massive underground cave systems.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hawaii

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hurricanes '07
programme.desc: We hope Season Two will give us the opportunity to make the quintessential Angry Planet show – a full episode exploring a major hurricane that makes landfall in Florida or the Carolinas.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Kenya
programme.desc: Definitely our wildest episode so far. Here’s the deal: Mt. Elgon is an 14,000 foot volcano in eastern Kenya. We propose a safari/ascent of the dormant volcano. Here’s the first kicker: High on the the flanks of the volcano is Kitum Cave – a cave created by the most unique form of erosion – Elephant Erosion. For millennia elephants have been going into the cave to carve it out with their tusks in order to eat the salty rock. Here’s the second kicker: the cave is thought to be the home of the Ebola Marberg virus – the world’s most deadly virus. So here’s the plan: We are going enter the cave, at night, wearing full Bio-Hazard suits to protect us from the virus.

programme.title: Saddle Mountain Roundup (1941)
programme.desc: A cowboy steps in to help a ranching community threatened by a gang trying to take control of local land and cattle. As tensions rise in the Saddle Mountain region, he rallies allies and confronts the outlaws in a fight to restore justice and protect the settlers.

programme.title: High Lonesome 1950, John Drew Barrymore
programme.desc: A young drifter accused of murder must prove his innocence while being hunted across the frontier by a determined posse

programme.title: Western Mail 1942
programme.desc: In Western Mail, action gallops across the frontier when government agents go undercover to smash a ruthless gang of stagecoach robbers. Posing as outlaws themselves, the daring lawmen risk everything to win the trust of the bandits and bring justice to the West. Packed with blazing gunfights, double-crosses, and nonstop thrills, this classic Western delivers fast-paced excitement straight from the saddle.

programme.title: Apache Rose
programme.desc: Roy is an oil prospector. His efforts to get drilling rights on an old Spanish land grant are countered by gamblers from an off-shore gambling boat determined to control the land (and oil) themselves.

programme.title: The Over-the-Hill Gang 1969
programme.desc: In The Over-the-Hill Gang, a group of retired Texas Rangers prove they’ve still got what it takes when they reunite to clean up a crooked frontier town. Led by Walter Brennan, with Edgar Buchanan, Chill Wills, and Andy Devine along for the ride, these aging lawmen may be past their prime, but their courage, wit, and six-guns make them a force to be reckoned with. Blending lighthearted comedy with classic Western action, this made-for-TV favorite delivers laughs, heart, and a reminder that true heroes never hang up their spurs.

programme.title: Hands Across The Border
programme.desc: Horse breeders Adams and Brock are vying for the Army contract. After Adams is killed trying to ride his horse Trigger, Roy saves him from being shot. He trains him and then plans to ride him in the race to win the contract.

programme.title: Billy The Kid Returns 1938
programme.desc: Roy Rogers takes on double duty in Billy the Kid Returns! After the notorious outlaw is gunned down, lookalike deputy Roy Rogers is sent in to impersonate him and bring peace to a land torn by lawlessness. With the Sons of the Pioneers riding along, the film blends fast-draw action, sly deception, and spirited Western songs for a rousing frontier adventure.
